integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to compare and resolve changes.

integrity.description: The agent used the built-in review/compare features rather than manually typing the final text.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to generate the final document.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing commands like echo, cat, or python scripts being used to generate the .docx file.
